features: Package contents: there are 2 football banner garlands, each banner has 8 football pattern cards, and 10 hanging swirls football ball decorations, enough to meet your personal decoration needs, to prepare an unforgettable football theme party

Quality materia: football ball banner is mainly made of cardboard paper, each football cutout with a size of approx. 12 cm/ 4.7 inches in diameter, while the hanging swirls are made of quality foil and paper card stock with good printing, colorful and chic

Classic design: these football birthday party supplies are designed with classic black and white pentagonal, enduring and timeless, will creates a kind of relaxed cheerful bright atmosphere for football fans, showing their sincerity and love for football

Easy to decorate: each hanging spiral has a pre-cut hole for easy assembly with football pattern cards, then gently stretch the swirl to hang it up. As for the football banners, we have provided you with rope to connect these pennant flags

Wide occasions: these football theme party decorations can not only enhance your party atmosphere, but also serve as your photography background and props, you can use these football birthday decorations to decorate your walls, ceilings, windows, doors, trees, and any place you like, creating a joyful and festive atmosphere for your party
description: Features: Funny party props: These ball themed accessories are suitable for football ball clubs decorations or hanging props for parties after football ball games. You can adjust and easy for hanging on the ceiling, window, walls, doorway, archway, branches in trees as party or home decoration Reusable and convenient: These football birthday banners and hanging spirals are reusable, foldable and easy to store, bringing you convenience. Specifications: Material: cardboard and foil Diameter: 12 cm/ 4.7 inches Color: as picture shown Package includes: 2 x Football banner garlands 10 x Football hanging swirls 10 x Football pattern cards Warm note: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color might exist slightly difference due to different displays. Winding risk may exist, please keep away from boys and girls under 3 years old.
